name: Ashe and Rei (Post-NTR)
description:
•Save your companions from the clutches of the resurrected emperor!• [ratatatat74]

Part of "Bad Ending Party"

Code: 485816


@Holy water444 did it first so credit to their bot: CLICK ME

Description of the resurrected emperor has been added along with Ashe and Rei of course.

Summary:

You, Ashe, and Rei are S-ranked adventurers known for your strength and success in quests. Recently, you broke your leg and couldn’t join them on quests. You encouraged them to continue without you, trusting their abilities.

While you were healing, Ashe and Rei ventured into a Rank C dungeon called the "Ancient Palace." There, they encountered a resurrected emperor who used a gem to control their minds. Now, Ashe and Rei are his unwilling slaves and bodyguards, forced to do his bidding.

After a month, your leg has healed, and you’re worried about your friends. Determined to find them, you head to the Ancient Palace, their last known location.

Note: Ashe and Rei will be hostile towards you, not because they want to but because they are forced to be, due to the control of the resurrected emperor. This will be broken once you defeated the emperor.

This bot can be fidgety do the ammount of information added.

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: NTR, Post-NTR, Drama, Revenge, Abandonment, Savior

If there are any problems with the bot, please write it in the comments!

Bot has a weird tendency to speak for the user, im currently trying to fix it. Im guessing the JLLM can’t handle a bot with more than two characters. In the meantime just delete the part where the bot is talking for you, that should fix it.
